response.original_title: How I Met My Girlfriend: Vanna Bardot
response.overview: You walk into the open house event just to look around - until she walks in. Vanna Bardot, all sexy curves, confidence, and smoldering beauty, is suddenly there in front of you, and you're the only ones in the place. On a reckless, cocky impulse, you pretend to be the real estate agent. She plays along - teasing smiles, lingering glances, and a heat that builds with every step you take together through the empty house. Your mind's already racing with dirty thoughts, and lucky for you, Vanna's had the same idea since the moment she laid eyes on you. Before long, you're upstairs, hands all over each other, stealing a wildly hot moment while guests begin to arrive downstairs. But it doesn't end there. You ask for her number, and she says yes - with a glint in her eyes that says she wants more. What follows is a first date you'll never forget: an after-hours club, dim lights, flirtation turned confession, and the gorgeous bartender Gizelle Blanco, who instantly catches Vanna's hungry gaze.
response.title: How I Met My Girlfriend: Vanna Bardot
